summary: Heavily focused on building a SaaS crypto trading platform, with parallel work on embedded firmware, AI/ML research, and developer tooling.

items.title: SaaS crypto trading platform development
items.description: Built out the core SaaS crypto trading platform, including proxy infrastructure, strategy templates, billing, and deployment pipelines.

items.title: Firmware iteration for ESP32-S3 HID emulation
items.description: Developed new firmware variants for the ESP32-S3 mouse and keyboard emulation project.

items.title: Windows Explorer file-tagging utility
items.description: Polished the Windows Explorer file-tagging tool, focusing on release workflows and metadata handling.

items.title: Personal CV project with mouse and keyboard emulation
items.description: Iterated on a personal project involving mouse/keyboard emulation, overlays, and screen capture.

items.title: Custom firmware for e-ink device
items.description: Extended custom e-reader firmware with map rendering, a knowledge base app, and encoding fixes.

items.title: Proxy client maintenance
items.description: Maintained a proxy client fork, updating dependencies and adding transport support.

items.title: Crypto price prediction model research
items.description: Conducted deep research on crypto price prediction models, experimenting with Mixture of Experts and ensemble architectures.

items.title: Android LLM chat assistant with phone use
items.description: Built an on-device LLM chat assistant for Android, focusing on sub-agent delegation and tool execution.

items.title: Backend API for Android assistant
items.description: Set up the ASP.NET Core backend for the Ozwil Android assistant project.

items.title: E-ink launcher for Android
items.description: Developed a note-taking-centric Android launcher designed for e-ink readers.

items.title: Windows Explorer file-tagging utility
items.description: Worked on CI/CD pipelines, Microsoft Store publishing, and CLI features for the file-tagging utility.

items.title: Public documentation for file-tagging utility
items.description: Updated documentation and changelog for the public release of the file-tagging tool.

items.title: n8n node for Telegram automation
items.description: Maintained a fork of a Telegram automation node for n8n, fixing auth and CI issues.

items.title: Graph-powered code intelligence engine
items.description: Developed a code intelligence engine that indexes codebases into a knowledge graph.

items.title: Personal Neovim configuration
items.description: Maintained a personal Neovim IDE setup, updating for compatibility and adding remote clipboard support.

items.title: YOLO labeling tool
items.description: Built a minimalistic, fast YOLO labeling tool for personal projects.

items.title: Dotfiles management
items.description: Set up chezmoi-managed dotfiles with encrypted secrets.

items.title: Computer vision for online poker
items.description: Developed a computer vision pipeline for analyzing online poker games, focusing on state recovery and hand detection.

items.title: n8n node for Claude Code
items.description: Updated an n8n node for Claude Code to use the latest agent SDK.

items.title: Android tasker application
items.description: Built an Android task management app with touch event visualization.

items.title: SaaS crypto trading platform foundation
items.description: Laid the foundation for the crypto trading platform, completing the initial .NET rewrite and core infrastructure.

items.title: ESP32-S3 HID firmware development
items.description: Developed multiple versions of the HID emulation firmware, adding BLE, USB touch, and performance profiles.

items.title: Autonomous multi-session AI coding tool
items.description: Built an autonomous AI coding tool with worktree management and squash merging.

items.title: Freqtrade strategy development
items.description: Developed and optimized numerous trading strategies for the Freqtrade bot.

items.title: Telegram bot for Freqtrade monitoring
items.description: Built a multi-bot Telegram interface for monitoring Freqtrade instances.

items.title: Flutter-based Freqtrade monitor
items.description: Developed a mobile monitoring app for Freqtrade with charts and profit tracking.

items.title: Telegram automation and content collection
items.description: Worked on Telegram automation tools for content forwarding and summarization.

items.title: Telegram bot for ChatGPT
items.description: Maintained a .NET-based Telegram bot for ChatGPT.

items.title: Content collector service
items.description: Built a content collection service with webhook and ad filtering features.

items.description: Optimized trading strategies for Freqtrade, focusing on hyperparameter tuning and leverage settings.
